chapters.title: Electrostatics
chapters.transcript: Coulomb's law, electric field, Gauss's law. Potential and voltage. Conductors vs insulators.

chapters.title: Magnetostatics
chapters.transcript: Biot-Savart law, Ampere's law. Magnetic field from currents. Lorentz force.

chapters.title: Faraday's Law
chapters.transcript: Electromagnetic induction. Lenz's law. Transformers and generators.

chapters.title: Maxwell's Equations
chapters.transcript: Integral and differential forms. Displacement current. Electromagnetic waves.

chapters.title: Electromagnetic Waves
chapters.transcript: Plane waves, polarization. Poynting vector. Reflection and refraction.
